ModMetaData.name: Military
ModMetaData.author: Anonymous
ModMetaData.description:
Military adds a full command structure to your RimWorld colony.
Build a real fighting force with ranks, squads, patrol routes, bodyguards, defend zones, combat training, and automatic threat response.
Promotions are earned through combat, ranks grant meaningful battlefield bonuses, and v0.6 adds morale, mood, social, and command-presence effects tied directly to squads, leadership, patrol duty, bodyguard duty, and battlefield losses.
The dedicated Military tab gives quick control over ranks, assignments, patrols, training, and squad organization in one place.
Built for RimWorld 1.6.
Requires Harmony. Optional: [RH2] Rimmu-Nation2 - Clothing for enhanced Helix Corporation soldier appearance.
